raw_transcript: It’s done via colonoscopy while you're asleep, so you don't experience anything. We're also seeing new FDA-approved 'pill' versions of the transplant, like Vowst, which you take by mouth. We can discuss that once we finish this round of Fidaxomicin.
final_corrected_note: It’s done via colonoscopy while you're asleep, so you don't experience anything. We're also seeing new FDA-approved 'pill' versions of the transplant, like Vowst, which you take by mouth. We can discuss that once we finish this round of Fidaxomicin.
